subcodes.first_line: O ye two seekers of the light of guidance! Praise be unto God that through the aid and bounty of His Divine Unity the veil hath been lifted and the door opened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو طالب نور هدایت الحمد لله بعون و عنایت حضرت احدیت کشف غطا شد و فتح باب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
